scripts.test: cd contracts && NODE_PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules npx hardhat test
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && NODE_PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules npx hardhat run ../scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost
scripts.deploy:paseo: cd contracts && NODE_PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules npx hardhat run ../scripts/deploy.ts --network polkadot_hub_paseo
scripts.demo: cd contracts && NODE_PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules npx hardhat run ../scripts/demo-flow.ts --network localhost
scripts.demo:paseo: cd contracts && NODE_PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules npx hardhat run ../scripts/demo-flow.ts --network polkadot_hub_paseo
scripts.relayer:paseo: cd contracts && NODE_PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules NETWORK=paseo npx ts-node ../scripts/relayer.ts
scripts.start: cd contracts && NODE_PATH=$(pwd)/../node_modules NETWORK=paseo npx ts-node --transpile-only --skip-project --compiler-options '{"module":"commonjs","esModuleInterop":true,"resolveJsonModule":true}' ../scripts/relayer.ts
